subcodes.first_line: O handmaids of the Ancient Beauty! Though in the Dispensation of the Qur'án womankind was accounted weak and was denied certain rights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء جمال قدم هر چند در کور فرقان طائفه نساء جنس ضعیف شمرده شدند و در حقوق
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
